attributes.description: Cross-artifact file-access and movement: (1) Shellbags — folders the user navigated into, (2) LNK files — files the user actually opened and Windows tracked as 'recent', (3) MFT — every file create/modify recorded in the filesystem. All three are user-attributable proof that a file was touched, opened, or created.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"_index : (shellbags-* or lnkfiles-*) or (_index : filesystem-* and file.type : file)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Insider Threat: File Access & Movement (shellbags + LNK + MFT)
